modules.name: Requirements Analysis & System Design
modules.notes: Architecture, data model, and docs are present in repo.

modules.name: Core Inventory Management Module
modules.notes: Core controls and traceability requirements are fully implemented and tracked.

modules.name: Barcode Generation & Scanning Module
modules.notes: QR/1D generation and camera/USB/manual validation flows are implemented with fallback paths.

modules.name: High-Tech Features & Analytics
modules.notes: Dashboards, reporting, governance analytics checks, and audit integrity controls are implemented.

modules.name: UI/UX Design & Responsiveness
modules.notes: Usability and responsive validation evidence now exists with governance checks.

modules.name: Testing, Deployment & Handover
modules.notes: Governance scripts now cover build, performance, security, backup/restore, and documentation checks.

FR-001.notes: Product lifecycle now enforces soft-deactivation (is_active) with inactive filtering and audit trail.

FR-006.notes: Stock receipt now enforces supplier for IN, supports GRN generation/storage, and records receipt movements.

FR-008.notes: Location tracking for items and location stock supported.

FR-009.notes: Request flow now supports inline customer/job creation via customer_name/job_title in API and UI.

FR-010.notes: Configurable routing combines value threshold and individual-item rule.

FR-016.notes: Individual usage now strictly requires valid scan proof token before usage record can be saved.

FR-018.notes: Return flow for individual and batch supported.

FR-019.notes: Faulty return handling now supports individual and batch parity, including quarantine location handling.

FR-020.notes: Automatic barcode/QR generation on individual receipt implemented.

FR-022.notes: USB scanner/manual scan entry and camera BarcodeDetector flows are integrated with explicit validation fallback in usage/issuance flows.

FR-024.notes: Stock-level report supports explicit product filter.

FR-025.notes: Stock movement report with filters implemented.

FR-026.notes: Traceability now includes receipt/issue/usage/return lifecycle events for individual instances and report export coverage.

FR-027.notes: Audit reporting now includes tamper-evident hash chain fields with integrity verification endpoint/script.

NFR-001.notes: 50-user acceptance profile is codified via scripts/perf_acceptance.py and governance defaults.

NFR-002.notes: Performance smoke now supports enforceable SLA gating via threshold flags and non-zero exit on violation.

NFR-003.notes: Scale benchmark automation now validates 10k SKU / 100k instance performance via scripts/scale_benchmark.py.

NFR-005.notes: Formal DB scaling strategy and evidence checks added via docs/db-scaling-strategy.md and scripts/db_scaling_checks.py.

NFR-006.notes: Password policy enforcement added (length/upper/lower/number/symbol) across user creation/bootstrap paths.

NFR-008.notes: Security headers are enforced server-side and backups support encryption at rest via passphrase-based Fernet encryption.

NFR-009.notes: Security smoke checks plus login lockout and hardened headers provide formal OWASP-oriented verification controls.

NFR-010.notes: Uptime/SLO instrumentation and probe evidence added via /health/slo metrics and scripts/uptime_probe.py.

NFR-011.notes: Backup automation now includes retention, encryption, manifesting, and restore utility for recovery/PITR workflows.

NFR-012.notes: Formal usability validation evidence is now tracked in docs/validation/usability-validation.md with governance checks.

NFR-013.notes: Responsive validation evidence is now tracked in docs/validation/responsive-validation.md with governance checks.

NFR-015.notes: Documentation governance policy, required docs checks, and changelog controls are now enforced by script.

NFR-016.notes: Release governance checks are automated via scripts/run_governance.ps1 with performance/backup/audit/tracker steps.

NFR-017.notes: Audit retention is operationalized with immutable archive artifacts and governance integration.

items.name: AI Assistant module
items.notes: Dedicated assistant UI and backend analysis endpoint `/api/assistant/analyze`.

items.name: Role-scoped assistant fallback intelligence
items.notes: Context-aware assistant responses when LLM provider is unavailable.

items.name: Finance console workspace
items.notes: Finance-oriented operational console and integration guidance.

items.name: Per-user personalization
items.notes: User preferences endpoint/UI (`/users/me/preferences`) with isolated user-level behavior.

items.name: In-app notification center
items.notes: Notification and recent-activity surfaces with mark-read flow.

items.name: SMTP test endpoint
items.notes: Admin endpoint `/api/admin/settings/test-email` for immediate email configuration validation.

items.name: Gmail quick setup UX
items.notes: Admin settings include Gmail presets, validation, and test-send flow.

items.name: Private-access deployment runbook
items.notes: Cross-platform deployment guide for company-only online access.
